---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Terminator
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem or limitation you are experiencing. Ex: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of the feature or change you would like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Use Case

Describe the specific scenario where this feature would be useful.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
